creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
1. It looks like OpenSSL 1.1 is needed, and OpenSSL 3 will make it fail
2. The packages for 14.0 were build from a ports tree that did not have the latest radarr updates yet.

I will update the port in the coming days.
Sorry for the delay, I'm not able to free a lot of time at the moment due to personal things.
